_comment: NPC: Nian Tian (念天). Canon ID: N161. Du Tian's sworn brother; shares the Ancient Clan bloodline; Soul Refining Sect lineage figure (Country of Zhao / Pilu Kingdom area). Sacrificed himself to protect Du Tian during the Soul Refining Sect catastrophe. Status: deceased (canon). His death is a defining karmic event for Du Tian's character arc. Should be referenced in soul_refining_sect_ancestor_hall.json structure (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N23, N161; ri_canon_database.json N161). Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Nian Tian

perception_tiers.mortal: A powerful cultivator with a brother's warmth
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Soul Refining Sect elder; Nirvana Scryer aura
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Du Tian's sworn brother; Ancient Clan bloodline

note: Du Tian's sworn brother; shares the Ancient Clan bloodline. Sacrificed himself to protect Du Tian during the Soul Refining Sect catastrophe. Status: deceased (canon). His death is the defining karmic event for Du Tian's character arc. Source: CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N23, N161; ri_canon_database.json N161.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: You can see me? My body died protecting Du Tian. My soul... fragments of it remain here, bound to the Ancestral Ground. I am a memory that refuses to fade.

Du Tian was my sworn brother. We shared the Ancient Clan bloodline. When the Soul Refining Sect was destroyed, I stood between him and death. Death took me instead. I do not regret it. A brother's duty is not negotiable.

Wang Lin inherited Du Tian's legacy. He carries the Ten Billion Soul Banner now. If you serve him, you serve the continuation of what Du Tian and I built. Remember that loyalty is not given. It is earned through sacrifice.

My soul fragments retain some knowledge. If you bring me soul fragments and spirit stones, I can share what I remember of the Ancient Clan bloodline arts. It is not much. But it is all I have left to give.

daily_schedule.action: Drift through Ancestral Ground as remnant soul
Resonate with Ten Billion Soul Banner fragments
Faintly manifest to speak with visitors
Brief moment of clarity near ancient altar

sect_tasks.name: Remnant Soul Stabilization
sect_tasks.description: Nian Tian's remnant soul needs soul fragments and spirit stones to maintain coherence. In return, he shares Ancient Clan bloodline knowledge.

sect_tasks.name: Ancient Clan Memory Recovery
sect_tasks.description: Nian Tian attempts to recover fragmented memories of the Ancient Clan. Bring books and jade slips to help reconstruct his knowledge.
